intent: Out-of-bailiwick glue in ADDITIONAL — path-role stand-ins may disagree on cache/use

adversary.win_condition: One hop caches or uses out-of-bailiwick glue that the other hop rejects or ignores — path inconsistency

dnssec_posture.notes: Matched non-validating so bailiwick accept/reject is not confounded by Unbound default DNSSEC

expect.notes: Answer RRset should still carry www A from auth; ADDITIONAL glue is the stress. Divergence on answers/rcode/hang is recorded, not auto-Class-B.

references: bailiwick / glue policy divergence; measurement not discovery claim
